assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures AddJwtBearer with ForwardDefaultSelector using Selector.ForwardReferenceToken to forward reference tokens to introspection
assertions.rationale: The response does not include ForwardDefaultSelector or Selector.ForwardReferenceToken. It mentions needing 'some kind of scheme selection logic' but doesn't provide the actual Duende API.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures AddOAuth2Introspection with ClientId and ClientSecret for the API
assertions.rationale: The response configures AddOAuth2Introspection with ClientId and ClientSecret.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs registers two authentication scheme handlers (JWT Bearer and introspection)
assertions.rationale: The response registers both AddJwtBearer and AddOAuth2Introspection handlers.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets MapInboundClaims = false on the JWT Bearer handler
assertions.rationale: The response does not include MapInboundClaims = false on the JWT Bearer handler.
